text.title: ci-prod-readiness-gates Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the ci-prod-readiness-gates methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: All gates flipped to blocking on day 1; 80% of PRs red; team disables the workflow.
antipattern.fix: Re-enable in shadow mode for 14 days; collect noise rate; gate-by-gate flip.

antipattern.symptom: Workflow hard-codes bundle_kb=220 inline; budget file diverges.
antipattern.fix: Move all thresholds to prod-readiness.yaml; workflow reads it.

antipattern.symptom: Override via commit message keyword; no audit log; gate trust erodes.
antipattern.fix: Require `gate-exception` label + audit-log entry; CI fails without.

antipattern.symptom: perf_budget.bundle_kb_max set 18 months ago; bundle now twice the threshold.
antipattern.fix: Bump last_reviewed; recalibrate threshold from current p50.
